name: Centipede VR
summary: Step into Centipede VR, an intense Early Access survival shooter! Dropped into a dark, hostile environment, you must complete critical objectives while being hunted by relentless, giant centipedes. Test your endurance in a massive, grueling 30-to-40-minute survival gauntlet that demands sharp reflexes, precise shooting, and tactical movement. With no one to watch your back, you must rely on pure combat skill to manage your resources. Can you complete the mission and survive the swarm?
